title: Automatic Bubble Machine, Rechargeable Bubble Gun with LED Light & Bubble Solution,10000+ Bubbles Per Min Bubble Blaster Maker, 10 Holes Bubble Maker for Kids Adults, Outdoor Party Bubbles Blower Toys
features: 🛸【High Output 10000+ Bubble Machine】This upgraded electric bubble machine with 10 large holes, built-in super motor generates strong wind power, it can spew out more than 10,000 colourful bubbles per minute, allowing children to immerse themselves in a sea of wonderful bubbles, chase and play with the bubbles. It can bring infinite fun for you and your children, create harmonious time for parent-child interaction, a must have ambient bubble toy for outdoor activities.

🌈【Colourful LED Lights】The LED lights on the bubble machine make the bubbles more colourful. Dazzling lights will give you amazing effect, no matter it's day or night, press the trigger to see the colourful bubbles being blown, the wonderful lights render colourful bubbles, creating a dreamy and romantic night scene, perfect for outdoor activities, garden birthday parties, weddings, picnics, camping. No matter the children or adults, they loved the bubbles bring a happy atmosphere around.

💝【Quality Material & Safe Design】This kids bubble machine is made of high quality ABS material, sturdy and durable. Rounded corners all over the body, smooth and burr-free surface, takes good care of your baby's hands. Lightweight construction and ergonomic handle make it easy for small hands to grip and operate, very child friendly. The included bubble solution is safe for both children and pets. With rechargeable battery, eco-friendly and durable for kids to play all summer long.

💦【360° Leak-proof Design】This bubble gun is fully enclosed and equipped with a leak-proof device, it will not leak even if your child tilts it or inverts it. 360° Rotation with no leakage, won't stick to your baby's hands or dirty their clothes, they can safely take cute bubble machine and enjoy the fun of chasing bubbles. It can keep your child away from electronic products and enjoy a happy childhood in nature.

👋【Rechargeable Battery & Easy To Use】Our bubble machine set includes rechargeable batteries, when the batteries are fully charged, our bubble machine gun can play continuously for about 35-50 minutes. Therefore, there is no need to buy extra batteries. The bubble gun is fully automatic one-button operation, no need to soak, just put in the included bottle of bubble solution, pull the trigger and thousands of colourful bubbles will be steadily sprayed out.

🎁【Perfect Gift for Kids】This bubble gun kit comes with a cute box, perfect gift for kids and a great toy for parent-child entertainment. Whether indoor or outdoor, the bubble blower allows you to enjoy the rich bubbles everywhere. For weddings, birthdays, parties, outdoor games, Christmas, Valentine's Day, camping, beaches, entertainment, Halloween and a whole host of other events, this bubble gun will bring endless fun and a wonderful atmosphere. With your family enjoy the bubble mania!
description: Product description 🌞 Product description 🌞 ✔️Specification: Product Name: Automatic Bubble Machine, Rechargeable Bubble Gun with LED Light & Bubble Solution,10000+ Bubbles Per Min Bubble Blaster Maker Material: High Quality ABS Plastic and electronic components Bubble Machine Size: 18*7.5*14.3cm Color: Blue Suitable Ages: For 3 years and up Please note that when using it for the first time, you need to wait about 10 seconds to generate a large number of bubbles. ✔️Features: 360° eakproof design ensuring no messy bubble solution leaks 10 Holes for an abundance of rich and vibrant bubbles One-time automatic foaming feature, eliminating the need for repetitive manual dips in bubble solution Cool LED lights providing a visually stunning bubble experience at night USB C Rechargeable for uninterrupted fun Wide range of uses for party, wedding, celebrations and more. ✔️Package Includes: 1 * Automatic Bubble Machine 1 * Bubble Solution 1 * Rechargeable Battery 1 * USB Charging Cable Indications Children's entertainment, Creating a festive atmosphere, Play activities Ingredients Automatic Bubble Machine Bubble Gun Bubble Maker Safety Warning Do not aim at eyes or face.
